item.title: Voted for my life today, here's hoping the rest of my country did the same... Here's some Pilfered Trans Memes while I panik...
item.description:
Evening to all my Girlies, Boyo's and Beans, I'm back with another dump of Memes for Trans Femme, Trans Masc and Non descript entities as well as some general shenanigans and transphobe mocking. Freshly stolen from the high seas. While I try to be inclusive, please keep in mind that some of these may reflect my own experience as Trans Femme and is not intended to invalidate other's experiences.
Wore my skirt, thigh highs and wig with a hoodie last thursday and food delivery guy seemed to feel the need to get way closer than when I boymode to give me my food that time...
I have a crush on most of the the Girlies and Boyos who comment on my posts :3
Damn you brain!!!
Swedish Chef is trans?
Numbers go BRRRRRRR! NP is happy where I'm at so no changes to routine for now (though I was hoping for Prog and he said maybe in another 6 months :/ ) They did however call me back about my hemoglobin being super low so I gotta go have that looked at... Might explain why I've been feeling super tired and weak.
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
item.dc:creator: MelodyLightfoot

item.title: 2 years of HRT later….
item.description: Only photo I have I like - but it had an awful background that showed where I live in enough detail to locate with a simple reverse image search…. so I used chatGPT to replace the background with a landscape I like from Ireland.

item.title: Kingsday OOTD (OC)
item.description:
It was kingsday here in the Netherlands so I couldn’t help but draw my outfit for the day ;D
I am incredibly proud of my socks so here is another scrumptious shot!
As per the rules, Bean tax! If you like my stuff and want to see more, don’t hesitate to support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives

item.title: Three Year Anniversary With My Imgur Husband
item.description: Even when the world is falling apart (a daily occurrence these days) he keeps me grounded and grateful every day. I love you more than words can say @bucketsofweed. Even though we can’t be together today (I’m in Denver for work, he’s abroad for the same reason) we have the rest of our lives to celebrate. Link to our love story here: https://imgur.com/gallery/g1Wv3y3 Thank you, Imgur ❤️
item.dc:creator: bunniestbunny

item.title: Love the color…
item.description: Thought this was neat & wanted to share! Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!
item.dc:creator: Come2Japan

item.title: Magdeburg Hemispheres :Germany’s Most Famous Physics StuntIn 1654, Otto von Guericke changed science forever. In front of the Holy Roman Emperor, he joined two copper hemispheres and pumped the air out.
item.description: Magdeburg Hemispheres – Germany’s Most Famous Physics Stunt In 1654, Otto von Guericke changed science forever. In front of the Holy Roman Emperor, he joined two copper hemispheres and pumped the air out. Then, teams of horses — 16 in total — tried to pull them apart. They failed. The crowd gasped. The demonstration revealed the power of atmospheric pressure, stunning Europe. This single act in Magdeburg wasn’t just a spectacle — it marked the dawn of modern physics. And it came not from London or Paris, but a quiet German town where science first wowed the world.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: What Happened Today #88
item.description: This is bullying, not governing. Trump’s team is using federal power to punish anyone they disagree with: immigrants, universities, cities, prosecutors. It is not leadership. It is a flood of cruelty meant to dominate headlines and crush opposition. Lawsuits and rallies are fighting back because there is no other choice. Today’s news shows the real enemy is not policy. It is raw, opportunistic power. There are more than 1,000 May Day protests scheduled for Thursday. You will find something close enough to fit your day, even if it feels like the world is moving on. Meanwhile, don’t rely on social media algorithms. Get this info in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/carney-election 2. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-jenner-block 3. https://go.govbrief.today/assault-suicide-prevention 4. https://go.govbrief.today/novavax-rollout 5. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-law-review 6. https://go.govbrief.today/loomer-schiefler 7. https://go.govbrief.today/civil-rights-attorneys 8. https://go.govbrief.today/truman-jet-houthi 9. https://go.govbrief.today/unions-nonprofits-sue 10. https://go.govbrief.today/sanctuary-cops-orders 11. https://go.govbrief.today/climate-report-authors 12. https://go.govbrief.today/upenn-thomas-trump 13. https://go.govbrief.today/peace-corps-cuts 14. https://go.govbrief.today/asylum-charging 15. https://go.govbrief.today/whitehouse-posters-immigrants 16. https://go.govbrief.today/may-day-mobiliize
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: im a ….. librarian
item.description:
.
Friends from work tax, she did so good for her first bath
All clean and fluffy
Such a handsome guy
You is a silly noodle buddy
*boop*
Her handsome older brother
Such a love muffin
*siblings*
A silly guy
Lovebug
A toasted marshmallow gets a bath
And her fur explodes haha
Someone was super scared of the tub so we just did a sponge bath
Look at that happy girl
Fetch by the ditch so he can jump in for a swim
f r i e n d s
Such a cutie
obsessed with your ears buddy
looks like he’s laughing hehehehehe
playtime
a dirty dog is a happy dog
love you
item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: "It's a total ripoff of DragonBall Z."
item.dc:creator: MayMyEnemiesLiveLong

item.title: Hello void, please let me scream into you
item.description: I work for an AV production company in the UK, had to administer CPR to someone in one of our managed venues and they were pronounced dead in the ambulance on the way to the hospital. I’ve had work reach out to me and try to help but I already suffer from depression and I’m spiralling. I keep running over the events in my head and thinking of what I could’ve done better and now every time I have a moment to myself I see it all happening again. I know it’s out of my control and I can’t change what’s already happened but I can’t stop thinking about it. Would greatly appreciate some recommendations for help with sleep cause I haven’t slept more than 3 hours the last 2 days. EDIT: I just want to say thank you to everyone for your reassurance. You're all incredibly kind and I don't deserve this outpouring of support. The St John's Ambulance service is where I got my first aid training and the EMTs who arrived and took over from me are who really deserve any praise, I can't imagine the incredible stress responding to this kind of call constantly must put them under and I just wanted to voice my massive appreciation for anyone working within the NHS or any of the ambulance services.
item.dc:creator: fromtheabyss
